counters.description: dodge or ban if you can especially with warmog's now, he's unkillable, and he deals massive damage onto you with cleavers. take the grasp sheet into this matchup, and stand behind minions to not eat cleavers.
she will decimate you in every fight. unless she manages to fuck up her shroud and you ult her in it, she should just kill you when she feels like it. take comet, and rush kaenic.
with a %max health ability, an unstoppable, and a plethora of dashes, she is an incredibly hard matchup that scales lategame. you're fucked.

you can never kill him, and he scales better than you. not really in extreme tier because he crushes you, but because you can't really do anything against him and he will inevitably scale better. take grasp and try to be more useful in teamfights.
max e, and ult out of his ult. there is no way you kill him, but you shouldn't get killed if you're good enough.
i love magic damage, heals, true damage, a slow, and a dash.
never engage onto her, not even with your jungle. you're far too weak to ever 1v1 her.
oh joy, tanky, %health true damage, unstoppable, damage reduction, and 3 dashes. yippee?
take fleet and hope he sucks.
same with cho'gath, it's not that he fucks you up, it's that you can't do shit about it and he *will* scale.
take phase rush, 3 points e, then w max.
pray to god he doesn't have hands.
gg
he outscales you and you can't do shit.
pray he doesn't have hands.
ult his ult, he will always win in a duel.
pray he doesn't have limbs.
never eat his e.
pray he doesn't have anything resembling an organ.
pray he doesn't have hands.
if you can, always flash his ult.
he deals very much %max health magic damage.
pray he doesn't have bones, skin, whateverthefuck
